#  Edit an RFI (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This action can be performed in offline mode if the asset/item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode will sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **RFIs** tool on your Android device.
  2. Tap the RFI you want to edit.
  3. Tap **Edit**. 
  4. Tap a field to edit the information you want to change.
  5. Tap **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Change the Status of an RFI (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android/tutorials/change-the-status-of-an-rfi-android)
  * [Create a Change Event from an RFI (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android/tutorials/create-a-change-event-from-an-rfi-android)
  * [Mark an RFI Response as Official (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android/tutorials/mark-an-rfi-response-as-official-android)
title: Edit an RFI (Android)
description: How to edit an RFI from your Android mobile device.
